Improve this UI like a senior product designer and frontend engineer.

Context:
This is a mobile-first browser app for translating restaurant menu photos into English and building an order summary.

Use:
- shadcn/ui
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- Lucide React

Improve:
- layout hierarchy
- spacing
- mobile usability
- accessibility
- loading states
- empty states
- error states
- touch targets
- visual polish

Do not:
- change business logic unless necessary
- add restaurant search
- add authentication
- add database features
- create custom replacements for existing shadcn/ui components

After editing, briefly explain the UI changes.
